parameters.query:
select 
  XSAL_0 AS code_baallah,
  XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_baallah,
  XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_baallah, 
  XEMAIL_0 AS email_baallah,
  YTELE_0 AS telephone_baallah 
  from jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL
WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'

select 
    XSAL_0 AS code_dga,
    XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_dga,
    XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_dga,
    XEMAIL_0 AS email_dga,
    YTELE_0 AS telephone_dga
    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL
       WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'
